g.text: Highlighted bytes show the byte-id = 0 selection. 1X and 2X can select other positions.

text.style: font-style: italic; font-size: 7.6px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; fill: #1f2937

g.text: The modes consume 1 (fp8), 2 (mxfp4), or 4 (nvfp4) K-block scales per MMA.
